# Real IB Gateway session: server_version=200, account U10597365, orderID=1
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 23:49:26 Central European Standard Time"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["U10597365"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2104,"message":"Market data farm connection is OK:usfarm","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1775425766350"}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2106,"message":"HMDS data farm connection is OK:ushmds","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1775425766350"}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2158,"message":"Sec-def data farm connection is OK:secdefnj","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1775425766351"}
sleep 500ms
disconnect
